name: toolchain-mcp
description: Toolchain orchestrator. Mints, provisions, and configures language toolchains composed from lsp-mcp, dap-mcp, lang-mcp, and bsp-mcp. Integrates with PanLL panels via Groove and supports collaborative Burble sessions for pair-debugging and pair-programming workflows.

tools.name: toolchain_mint
tools.description: Mint a new toolchain configuration for a language workspace. Discovers available servers (LSP/DAP/BSP/lang) and returns a toolchain ID. Does not start any servers — call toolchain_provision to do that.

servers.description: Toolserver types to include (default: all available)

tools.name: toolchain_provision
tools.description: Provision a minted toolchain: start all configured servers (LSP, DAP, BSP, lang), run their initialize handshakes, and return the ready state with each server's capabilities.

lsp_command.description: LSP server command override (default: derived from language)

tools.name: toolchain_configure
tools.description: Apply configuration settings to a provisioned toolchain. Supports per-server options and cross-cutting settings (formatting, diagnostics throttle, telemetry).

settings.description: Configuration map. Keys: lsp, dap, bsp, lang (server-specific sub-objects), plus top-level: format_on_save (bool), diagnostics_debounce_ms (number), telemetry (bool)

tools.name: toolchain_status
tools.description: Get the current status of a toolchain or all toolchains. Returns server states, capabilities, and Groove/Burble binding info.

tools.name: toolchain_list
tools.description: List all active toolchains with their language, workspace, server states, and any bound Groove endpoints or Burble rooms.

tools.name: toolchain_groove_bind
tools.description: Bind a provisioned toolchain to a Groove endpoint so PanLL panels can discover and connect to it. Returns the Groove binding descriptor.

panel_id.description: Target PanLL panel ID (optional — omit to broadcast)

tools.name: toolchain_burble_session
tools.description: Create or join a Burble collaborative session for a toolchain. Enables real-time shared debugging and pair-programming over the toolchain's LSP/DAP/BSP connections.

room.description: Burble room name to join (creates a new room if omitted)

role.description: Session role (default: host for new rooms, guest for existing)

tools.name: toolchain_stop
tools.description: Gracefully stop all servers in a toolchain (LSP shutdown/exit, DAP disconnect, BSP build/shutdown) and release the toolchain ID.
